title: Mortar and Pestle Marble Set for Spices Pestos Seasonings Pastes Guacamole Bowl Herb Grinder Easy to Clean Included:Silicone Mat,Brush,Stainless Steel Spoon 4.33inch(Small,White Gray)
description:
About this item
⓵[Natural Marble]: The mortar and pestle are made of natural marble, and the interior of the spice grinder is frosted to increase friction. Our wide-end pestle has a large frosted surface, which effectively prevents food from splashing. The tail of the pestle is polished and will not scratch your palm. You can use it to make pesto, salsa and guacamole, seasonings,ground pepper, herbs, nuts, seeds, ginger root, etc.
⓶[Easy to Clean]: We come with a brush and a stainless steel spoon, which can be used before and after use to avoid the difficulty of cleaning the pestle and mortar after making the sauce. Just use a sponge to rinse the herb grinding bowl thoroughly in water without leaving any peculiar smell. Avoid using soap for the first cleaning.
⓷[High Capacity]:The capacity of a mortar & pestles is 250ml (1 cup), and the finished sauce can be eaten by at least 2 people. Compared with an electric grinder, it can fully stimulate the aroma of the ingredients themselves.Each of our mortar and pestle set will be carefully matched and selected to ensure that each one you receive is a perfect and beautiful product.
⓸[Exquisite Packaging]:Marble morter and pessel set packaging adopts customized carton + pearl cotton box, which can fully protect the products you receive from damage. The silicone pad has no peculiar smell (no risk of shedding like a sticky mat), protects your countertop and avoids sliding of the motor and avoid noise. It is also a creative gift.
⓹ [Unique Appearance]: Stone mortar and pestle set made of natural marble, we carefully match (you do not have to worry about mortar and pestle color difference) polished motor and pestle set small and kitchen kits will be special decorations. The appearance is smooth, and the hand feel is not rough. The curved design prevents you from slipping when you pick it up. The setting of each mortal pestal will be slightly different due to its uniqueness.
reviews_5s:
This is a lovely mortar and pestle with a nice design and real heft. It is very effective.It's a great weight not too heavy but heavy enough to hold up to the pressure of grinding. Nice and smooth so herbs don't get stuck in crevices. Cleans up nicelyIf you grow your own or buy them, this little gem is ideal for breaking them down at the last minute to capture a truly fresh result. There is nothing better. Besides being beautiful, it is sturdy and promises perfect function at your behest. Also impressive to others that may be in the kitchen. If you love ultra freshness in your chow, use a pestle to create the fine seasoning that great cooks demand. Also good for buying "bottled" spices that are not already ground. They are marked on the bottle and at home, produce the same heaven as those right out of the garden. This little item will give you a bit of flair and confidence.I bought this mortar & pestle to grind up large, hard pills that I sometimes have to give to my dog. The mortar & pestle easily reduces the pills to a fine powder that can then be mixed in my dog’s food. The little brush that’s included made it easy to clean off the pestle & get all the powder residue out of the mortar. The mortar is nice & deep which keeps everything contained. Both pieces are very easy to wipe or rinse off to clean.
I plan to use the product for crushing spices also. The pestle is comfortable to use and you don’t have to apply much pressure.
For being a utilitarian device, this product is really quite attractive, made from heavy marble, and comes with a small silicone mat, a small stiff bristled brush & a tiny spoon.
Highly recommend.Ok, I am a retired chemist and this is THE BEST mortar and pestle I've EVER used!! I mean this is laboratory, pharmacuetical quality, perfection!!! It's MASSIVELY large, beyond sturdy, weighs nearly FIVE POUNDS, and the grinding surface on both the mortar and the pestle is NOT smooth but creates perfect friction and contact. This thing is so solidly made and well crafted I will NEVER have to "go lightly" on it. This thing will be able to handle whatever I throw at it. Plus it will handle everything in one attempt. I won't have to grind each ingredient separately and then mix. I can throw everything into this at once and go to town! Plus this thing is an art of beauty. I am so thrilled with this purchase.

It was packaged securely, and not a scratch or crack on it when it arrived.

Also, there were these cute little bookmarks included as a thank you!!!! Seriously?? So pleased with this company.It doesn’t slide around on the counter when Im smushing things. Nice and heavy! It looks good on my counter, too!My old mortar was getting worn and really was too small for how I use it. I spotted this one, a great value for the price. It works beautifully, and I especially like the little silicone anti-slip mat that came with it. Being white, some of the spices can leave little stains, especially saffron, but I managed to remove those, and use the older brown one for stain-prone yellow and green spices.
This looks so pretty sitting in the kitchen window, too.Very nice mortar and pestle. it's small but the right size for what I needed. It has a little more color variations than I would like but I just turn it to the whiter side when it's on display. I read a lot of reviews on this and other marble mortars that the marble crumbles from the pestle and gets into whatever you're grinding so I just bought a wooden pestle to use with it and it worked great. When not in use I keep the marble pestle in it since it looks nicer.Super lindo y resistente, me encantóI gave it to a good friend.
reviews_1s:
Really pretty but most of the things I tried to use it for didn’t grind well at all so I’ve only used it 3 or 4 times since I bought it. Today I tried it on candy canes and it was working great until a chunk of stone cracked off the pestle and into the candy. Very disappointing. I would not recommend this product. I’m sorry I didn’t return it.The instructions on the product page state, "Before the first use, season with white rice flour in a mortar and grind until it becomes powder. This will remove dust and polish the mortar slightly." So I ground rice in the mortar until it was rice flour. The pestle and mortar still seemed powdery, so I just ground the pestle in the mortar with some water to see if the stone was turning into dust. It was. The first picture shows the clear water before grinding and the second shows the water filled with stone dust.

Since I don't like stone dust in my spices, I'm getting rid of this.

If you still want to order this set, be sure to test it quickly so that you can return it if it doesn't work.Broke in less than a year!
I didnt even realize it was broken.. never fell or any accidental damage!
Looks I was eating all these granite particles with anything I was grinding using this!
It should break like this by grinding few small sized dry spices..This is made of soapstone. I have had it for 4 months now and it still gives off a white powder every time I use it no matter how long I try to cure it (which shouldn't even be necessary if it were marble). I wish I could love this. But it doesn't even sound like the product in the videos of some other reviews or like my other one which is real marble. I'm very disappointed. After all of the positive reviews, I thought I found a winner. I was wrong.I bought this to grind spices. I placed my cardamom pods in it and particles of the marble came off of the mortar and pestle. Then I washed it and tried again. Same thing. I don't see a use for it if bits of the marble come into your food. I'm returning it.Notar head start to fall apart after 4 months of use…
Grain of stone powder fall into food…
Have to throw away because I don’t want to eat stone powder…You must season this before use. After a very extensive seasoning process, the stone grit it produces is the same. Therefore, it is completely useless as a culinary tool. Do not buy. 0/10. Of course this review will not be approved since it is honest.Given that most of the reviews were positive, I figured I'd try it. Unfortunately, I am one of the people who got one that broke after a few uses. The end of the pestle broke off in a way that made it look like the pestle was not a solid piece of marble: instead it seemed like the end was been glued on separately.BROKEN? This is crazy. Want a return replace with better material. Clean too...nope replacement came within one day....how come I initially waited 2 weeks...replacement was poor made and showed up without complete parts as advertised. Don't order from these folks.This is wrong that it cannot be returned. It was a Mother’s Day gift but I didn’t completely un pack it until today and did covered it was broken.
